name: Potato Carrot Pancake
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a small non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
2. In a large bowl, stir together the grated potatoes, grated carrot, chopped parsley, salt, and pepper.
3. Add the vegetable mixture to the hot skillet and flatten with a spatula.
4. When the pancake has browned on one side, reduce the heat and flip it over using a spatula.
5. Continue cooking until the pancake is crisp on the outside and tender on the inside, about 5 minutes per side.
Recipe By: TVFN How to Boil Water
Date: 09/26/96
